## What are you adding or changing?

- [ ] Adding a new tool
- [ ] Fixing a broken link
- [ ] Updating an existing entry
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] The tool is related to AI + audio
- [ ] I used the correct badge(s)
- [ ] The description is one sentence, starts with a capital letter, ends with a period
- [ ] I placed the tool in the correct alphabetical/logical position within the category
- [ ] The link is working and goes to the correct page
- [ ] This is one tool per PR

## Tool details (for new additions)

- **Name:**
- **URL:**
- **Category:**
- **Pricing model:** free / freemium / paid / enterprise
- **Why it belongs here:**
